title: Walrus
description: extracells walrus but it's standalone and ported to fabric 1.20.1 (real)
body:
# Walrus
It's the [Extra Cells](https://github.com/ExtraCells/ExtraCells2) walrus, but for Fabric on Minecraft 1.20.1.

![Two walrus blocks, shown alongside a walrus in an item frame and a walrus being held by the player.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8675d5677a84aebc898b10e82eb153fbde58aed9_0.webp)

## Q/A
### Why?
I was too preoccupied with whether I could that I never considered whether I should.

### Will you port this to NeoForge/$CURRENT_MC_VERSION/another loader or version?
Probably not. On NeoForge 1.20.1, you could probably use [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector), but this is untested.
